name: Countryside Methodist Church
description: Countryside Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in Topeka, KS. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
hours: Mon-Thurs. 9 am -4 pm Sun. 8 am - 12 pm Appointments are available outside office hours upon request. Facebook - Instagram - YouTube church websites by clover

name: Topeka  Country Club
description: Topeka Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Topeka, KS. There are 7 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Wood Valley Raquet Club
description:
No open play, court reservation only. No specific schedule for pickleball, call club staff for available schedule. Fee reduced to $3 for member, $5 for non-member.
